description: Archived V1.41 plan per Profile B. P1 merged to iteration/v1.41 with QC/QA Approve after fix-wave re-review + QA-blocker-fix re-verify.
title: P1 — DF-61 selection pool + inspiration (creator-scoped, Pool/Ideas/)

metadata.description: P1 — DF-61 selection pool and inspiration pool (DB SSOT)
metadata.qc: qc1 (architecture) Approve (post-fix-wave); qc2 (security+correctness) Approve; qc3 (performance+reliability) Approve (post-fix-wave). Consolidated gate: Approve (bd086f57).
metadata.qa: Initial Request Changes (3 small items); re-verification Approve (db955ad3). 6/6 ACs PASS (after re-verify); 13/13 selection_pool tests pass; 49/49 command_surface_contract tests pass; clippy + fmt clean.
shipped: Migration 202606100003_v141_inspiration_items.sql: new inspiration_items table (item_id, creator_id, rel_path, title, status, promoted_work_id, created_at, promoted_at) with CHECK + 2 indexes (creator_id + unique creator_id+rel_path)
Migration 202606100004_v141_pool_inspiration_indexes.sql: covering indexes (creator_id, status, updated_at DESC) for pool and (creator_id, status, created_at DESC) for inspiration
novel_pool_entries DAO: list_pool_entries (paginated, default 200, max 1000) + count_pool_entries + archive_pool_entry (with creator_id guard) + mark_pool_entry_completed_for_work

inspiration_items DAO: list_inspiration (paginated, default 200, max 1000) + count_inspiration + create_inspiration_with_scaffold (atomic tmp+rename) + archive_inspiration (with creator_id guard) + get_inspiration (with creator_id filter) + promote_inspiration (status update) + inspiration_promote_atomic (single tx wrapping Work insert + pool upsert + inspiration update)

Daemon HTTP: GET /v1/local/works/pool?status=...&limit=&offset= ; POST /v1/local/works/pool/promote ; POST /v1/local/works/pool/archive ; POST /v1/local/works/pool/inspiration (add) ; GET /v1/local/works/pool/inspiration?status=...&limit=&offset= ; POST /v1/local/works/pool/inspiration/promote ; POST /v1/local/works/pool/inspiration/archive. All with creator_id checks.
CLI: creator works pool (list/promote/archive) + creator works pool inspiration (add/list/promote/archive); --limit/--offset flags; --help documents pool vs per-Work inspiration_log distinction

Cross-creator authz: archive_pool_entry + archive_inspiration + get_inspiration all take creator_id and filter by it; promote_inspiration_handler returns 404 on cross-creator mismatch; promote_pool_entry also tightened
List pagination: limit (default 200, cap 1000) + offset + total count; CLI --limit/--offset flags; response shape {entries, total, limit, offset}
Covering indexes: novel_pool_entries (creator_id, status, updated_at DESC) + inspiration_items (creator_id, status, created_at DESC)
Sync I/O: create_inspiration_with_scaffold wrapped in tokio::task::spawn_blocking
PoolEntryDto: added title field + From<PoolEntry> extraction; 4 construction sites deduped
InspirationItemDto: From<InspirationItem> extraction; 2 construction sites deduped
mark_work_completed: on pool update failure, logs tracing::error! + clears completion_locked_at so supervisor retries on next tick

Path change: inspiration MD scaffold moved from Works/_pool/灵感池/<slug>.md to {workspace}/Pool/Ideas/<slug>.md (creator-scoped, per user 2026-06-10). New nexus-home-layout::creator_inspiration_dir helper centralizes the layout.

Spec amendments: novel-work-pool.md §3.1/§3.3/§3.4/§5 (path + why Pool/Ideas/) + §5.1 (--idea semantics); cli-spec.md §6.2H; local-db-schema.md §4.1.5; deferred-tracker DF-61 row (Shipped) + §3.6.1 V1.41 overlay line 208 (Pool/Ideas/)
CLI contract test: v141_pool_inspiration_help_disambiguates_from_work_log (asserts --help mentions distinct from per-Work works.inspiration_log)

notes: P1 — DF-61 selection pool + inspiration. AC1..AC6 all PASS post-fix-wave + post-QA-blocker-fix. 23 commits on feature/v1.41-selection-pool (5 original + 13 fix-wave + 4 QA-blocker-fix + 1 report). 3 merge commits on iteration/v1.41. Pool is creator-scoped (per user 2026-06-10 path correction), inspiration MD scaffold at {workspace}/Pool/Ideas/. New nexus-home-layout::creator_inspiration_dir helper. 19 residuals registered (8 closed in fix wave; 11 defer to V1.42/P-last/backlog; 2 pre-existing flakes out-of-scope). AC5 help text now distinguishes pool from per-Work inspiration_log. R-V141P1-02 has owner field. Deferred-tracker DF-61 row promoted to Shipped.
